Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I need to create an event log from the given tables for process mining The main goal is to integrate all these tables into a single event log with the required columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource and possibly other attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Orders table has the initial order data Each order has an order_id which will be the case ID The Order Lines table links items to orders and includes picking dates and picker IDs The Delivery table has dispatch and arrival dates so those can be the dispatch and arrival events The Invoice table has invoice dates and the Payments table has payment dates

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Each order is a case The first event should be Order Created with the order_date

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The resource here would be the sales_person_id But I need to map that to the resource name using the Resources table

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: maybe I should include both the ID and the name Or just the name

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: for each delivery each DLV record there would be two events Order Dispatched and Order Arrived

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: each invoice is an Invoice Issued event with the billing persons name Payments each payment is a Payment Received event with the payment method and reference as attributes

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
